# Click2Call

> Click2Call is an Australian business communications provider specialising in AI-enhanced Cloud PBX, VoIP, and SIP Trunking services. We help businesses of all sizes across Australia to modernise their phone systems, reduce costs, and improve customer interactions with intelligent voice tools. Operated by Bcom Services Pty Ltd (ABN: 92 636 893 108).

## Core Services

- **Cloud PBX**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/cloud-pbx](https://www.click2call.com.au/cloud-pbx) — A fully-featured, hardware-free business phone system hosted in the cloud. Includes auto-attendant, call recording, voicemail-to-email, ring groups, and business hours routing.
- **AI Voice Tools**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/ai-voice-tools](https://www.click2call.com.au/ai-voice-tools) — Tools for real-time call transcription, sentiment analysis, AI-powered call summaries, and smart routing.
- **AI Receptionist**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/ai-receptionist](https://www.click2call.com.au/ai-receptionist) — A 24/7 conversational AI that answers, routes, and handles inbound calls using natural language.
- **Microsoft Teams Calling**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/microsoft-teams-calling](https://www.click2call.com.au/microsoft-teams-calling) — Enables external PSTN calls directly from the Microsoft Teams interface via Direct Routing.
- **Developer API**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/api](https://www.click2call.com.au/api) — A JSON-based REST API that lets developers and AI builders connect custom software directly to a real Australian phone system. Includes voice control, real-time call data, AI transcription, sentiment analysis, webhooks, and native ElevenLabs integration. API access is included free with every Cloud PBX account. Full documentation at [https://portal.click2call.com.au/apidocs](https://portal.click2call.com.au/apidocs).
- **SIP Trunks**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/sip-trunks](https://www.click2call.com.au/sip-trunks) — A modern, flexible replacement for traditional ISDN phone lines. Compatible with all major IP PBX systems.

## Developer API & Integration

Click2Call provides a full JSON-based REST API for developers and AI builders who want to integrate a real Australian phone system into their custom software. The API is hosted at `https://portal.click2call.com.au/api/` and uses token-based authentication.

### Who It Is For

The Click2Call API is designed for:
- Developers building custom business software using AI coding tools such as Claude, Cursor, or ChatGPT
- Teams building AI agents or LLM-powered applications that need to make or receive real phone calls
- Businesses connecting their CRM, support portal, or automation workflows to their phone system
- Developers integrating ElevenLabs voice agents with an Australian phone number

### Key Capability Groups

- **Voice Functions** — Manage phone lines, enable or disable call recording, retrieve phone numbers, copy line settings, download audio files (voicemail, auto-attendant, music on hold, ring tones)
- **AI Functions** — Get call transcriptions, AI call summaries, sentiment analysis, profanity analysis, and text-to-speech (TTS) audio generation. Retrieve a list of available AI voices.
- **Account Functions** — Retrieve call records, billing history, account balance, channel information, customer details, and bundle usage data
- **Webhooks** — Receive real-time HTTP POST events to any URL for: Incoming Calls (Ringing, Answered, Ended, Missed), Outgoing Calls (Ringing, Answered, Ended, Unattended), and AI Analysis (Recording and AI transcription generation complete)
- **Internet Functions** — Manage internet-related account settings

### ElevenLabs Native Integration

Click2Call has a native ElevenLabs integration built into the line profile settings. Developers can set the Connection Type to "Eleven Labs AI" on any phone line, which configures the inbound SIP URI route to `sip:sip.rtc.elevenlabs.io:5060;transport=tcp`. This allows an ElevenLabs voice agent to answer inbound calls on a real Australian phone number without any manual SIP configuration.

### Copy-Paste AI Instructions

Every Click2Call account includes a complete set of ready-made instructions written specifically for AI coding tools. Developers can copy these instructions from the portal (API > Getting Started) and paste them directly into Claude, Cursor, or ChatGPT to get the API integration working without any prior API experience.

### API Access

- **API Base URL**: `https://portal.click2call.com.au/api/`
- **Authentication**: Token-based (Bearer token)
- **Format**: JSON POST requests with `context` and `action` parameters
- **Documentation**: [https://portal.click2call.com.au/apidocs](https://portal.click2call.com.au/apidocs)
- **Marketing Page**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/api](https://www.click2call.com.au/api)
- **Cost**: Included free with every Cloud PBX account ($25/month per user)
- **Trial**: 30-day free trial, no credit card required

### Common Developer Use Cases

- Build a support portal that logs every inbound and outbound call with full transcription and AI summary
- Connect a CRM so that when a call is answered, the caller's history appears automatically
- Build a real-time call activity dashboard showing live call status across the team
- Use webhooks to trigger automated follow-up actions when a call ends (e.g. send a summary email, create a task in a project management tool)
- Connect an ElevenLabs AI voice agent to a real Australian phone number for inbound call handling
- Use the TTS API to generate professional voicemail greetings and auto-attendant messages programmatically
- Pull call records and sentiment data into an LLM for business intelligence and coaching

## Key Pages

- **Pricing & VoIP Cost Calculator**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/pricing](https://www.click2call.com.au/pricing) — Transparent, flat-rate prepaid pricing for all services. Cloud PBX User is $25/mo (includes local number, 300 outbound mins, unlimited inbound). Extra Business Number (Inbound Line) is $10/mo. No lock-in contracts. The pricing page includes a free interactive VoIP cost calculator and quote builder at [https://www.click2call.com.au/pricing/#calculator](https://www.click2call.com.au/pricing/#calculator) — users can calculate their exact monthly and upfront costs and download a formal PDF quote instantly.
- **Switch to Click2Call**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/compare](https://www.click2call.com.au/compare) — Step-by-step guide to switching your business phone system to Click2Call. Covers the 8-step setup process (zero downtime via temporary number diversion), number porting (local $50 + GST, 1300/1800 $100 + GST, 5–10 business days), self-setup (free) vs managed setup ($300 + GST), PC app vs mobile app guidance, and a real-world cost example for a 3-user office ($75/mo ongoing).
- **FAQ**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/faq](https://www.click2call.com.au/faq) — Comprehensive answers to frequently asked questions about our services.
- **Case Studies**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/case-studies](https://www.click2call.com.au/case-studies) — Real-world examples of Australian businesses using Click2Call.
- **Case Study — Brisbane Accounting Firm**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/case-studies/accounting-firm-ai-receptionist/](https://www.click2call.com.au/case-studies/accounting-firm-ai-receptionist/) — How a Brisbane accounting firm cut missed calls by 40% using Click2Call's AI Receptionist.
- **Case Study — Sydney Plumbing Business**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/case-studies/plumbing-business-cloud-pbx/](https://www.click2call.com.au/case-studies/plumbing-business-cloud-pbx/) — How a Sydney plumbing business with three locations unified its phone system using Click2Call Cloud PBX.
- **Case Study — Melbourne Medical Clinic**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/case-studies/medical-clinic-ai-transcription/](https://www.click2call.com.au/case-studies/medical-clinic-ai-transcription/) — How a Melbourne medical clinic achieved 100% call compliance using Click2Call AI Voice Tools transcription.
- **About**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/about](https://www.click2call.com.au/about) — About Click2Call, our team, and our mission.
- **Contact**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/contact](https://www.click2call.com.au/contact) — Contact Click2Call for sales enquiries and support.
- **Support**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/support](https://www.click2call.com.au/support) — Technical support resources and contact details.

Click2Call provides VoIP phone systems and Cloud PBX solutions to businesses across Australia, including:

- **VoIP Australia (National)**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-australia](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-australia)
- **VoIP Sydney**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-sydney](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-sydney) — Local 02 numbers. Nearby: Newcastle, Wollongong.

- **VoIP Brisbane**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-brisbane](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-brisbane) — Local 07 numbers. Nearby: Gold Coast, Sunshine Coast.

- **VoIP Darwin**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-darwin](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-darwin) — Local 08 numbers.
- **VoIP Hobart**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-hobart](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-hobart) — Local 03 numbers.

## About the Business

- **Legal Name**: Bcom Services Pty Ltd
- **Trading Name**: Click2Call
- **ABN**: 92 636 893 108
- **Phone**: 1300 884 879
- **Email**: support@click2call.com.au
- **Coverage**: Australia-wide
- **Customer Portal**: [https://portal.click2call.com.au](https://portal.click2call.com.au)

## Pricing (ex GST, AUD) — Pay As You Go

Click2Call uses simple, transparent flat-rate prepaid pricing with no lock-in contracts:

- **Cloud PBX Landline**: $10.00/month per line
- **Extra Business Number**: $10.00/month per number
- **Microsoft Teams Line**: $10.00/month per line
- **PBX Extensions**: Free
- **Channels**: Included with Cloud PBX User
- **Outbound call rates**: from $0.10/min (Australia & New Zealand fixed)
- **30-day free trial** — no credit card required
- **Activation**: up to 24 hours after signup
- **SIP Trunks**: available on request
- Full details: [https://www.click2call.com.au/pricing](https://www.click2call.com.au/pricing)

## Customer Access

- **New Customer Signup**: [https://portal.click2call.com.au/join/](https://portal.click2call.com.au/join/) — Start a free trial. Phone systems activate within 24 hours of signup.
- **Existing Customer Login**: [https://portal.click2call.com.au/login.php](https://portal.click2call.com.au/login.php) — Manage your phone system, users, call routing, and settings.

## Help Centre

The Click2Call Help Centre provides step-by-step guides for managing your Cloud PBX phone system via the customer portal.

- **Help Centre Index**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help](https://www.click2call.com.au/help) — Browse all how-to guides by category.

### Getting Started
- **Activating Your Account**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-activate-account](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-activate-account)
- **Adding Account Credit**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-account-credit](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-account-credit) — Click2Call operates on a pre-pay system; credit must be loaded before using paid features.

### Phone Numbers
- **Adding a Phone Number**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-phone-number](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-phone-number)
- **Porting an Existing Number**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-port-number](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-port-number)

### Extensions & Users
- **Adding an Extension**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-extension](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-extension)
- **Adding a New User**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-user](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-user) — Create a portal login for a team member, set their access level (Administrator or User), enable 2FA, and link them to an extension.
- **Setting Outbound Caller ID**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-set-outbound-caller-id](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-set-outbound-caller-id) — Configure what number is displayed when making outbound calls. Options include default number, on-net Extra Business Number, verified off-net number, random group, or call privacy (*67). Covers Force Caller ID on diverted calls and verifying external numbers.

### Phones & Devices
- **Adding a Desk Phone**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-desk-phone](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-desk-phone)
- **Setting Up a Softphone**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-set-up-softphone](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-set-up-softphone)

### Call Flows
- **Setting Up a Call Flow**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-set-up-call-flow](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-set-up-call-flow)
- **Creating a Ring Group**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-create-ring-group](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-create-ring-group)
- **Configuring Business Hours**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-configure-business-hours](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-configure-business-hours)
- **Setting Up Voicemail**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-set-up-voicemail](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-set-up-voicemail)
- **Viewing Call Recordings**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-view-call-recordings](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-view-call-recordings)

### Billing & Account

- **Viewing Account History**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-view-account-history](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-view-account-history) — View invoices, payment history, and credit balance in the portal.
- **Using Reports & Records**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-use-reports-and-records](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-use-reports-and-records) — Access call logs, usage reports, and analytics in the portal.

### AI Features
- **Setting Up the AI Receptionist**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-set-up-ai-receptionist](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-set-up-ai-receptionist) — Automated call routing using natural language. Callers say what they need; the AI transfers the call to the right department. Not a conversational agent.
- **Setting Up AI Agents**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-set-up-ai-agents](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-set-up-ai-agents) — A conversational AI voice agent that answers calls, holds full conversations, and responds to caller questions 24/7. Configured with a business profile, welcome message, AI voice actor, and call flow settings.
- **Using AI Speech to Create Voice Recordings**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-use-ai-speech](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-use-ai-speech) — Text-to-speech tool for generating professional voicemail greetings, auto-attendant messages, and seasonal recordings (e.g. Christmas closure). Replaces the old dial-in self-recording approach.
- **Setting Up AI Voicemail Greetings**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-set-up-ai-voicemail](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-set-up-ai-voicemail) — Creates consistent, professional voicemail greetings across every extension using text-to-speech. Uses the MAILBOXNAME placeholder to personalise each greeting automatically.

## Tools & Interactive Features

### VoIP Cost Calculator & Quote Builder

- **URL**: https://www.click2call.com.au/pricing/#calculator
- **Type**: Free interactive web tool — no account or sales call required
- **Purpose**: Allows Australian businesses to calculate the exact cost of a Click2Call VoIP phone system and download a formal PDF quote for internal approval.
- **What it calculates**:
  - Monthly costs: Cloud PBX users at $25.00/user/month (ex GST), additional local numbers at $10.00/month, 1300 numbers at $10.00/month, 1800 numbers at $10.00/month
  - One-time upfront costs: number porting (local $50.00 each, 1300/1800 $100.00 each), system setup (self-setup free or Click2Call managed setup $300.00 for up to 3 users), hardware (Yealink T43U desk phone $450.00, Yealink W76P cordless $400.00)
  - GST (10%) calculated and displayed separately for both monthly and upfront totals
- **Quote generation**: Enter business name, contact name, and email to generate and download a formal PDF quote. The quote includes a line-item breakdown, GST, 14-day validity, Click2Call logo, ABN 92 636 893 108, and a reference to terms at click2call.com.au/terms/.
- **Intended audience**: Business owners, office managers, IT managers, and finance teams in Australia evaluating the cost of a VoIP phone system.
- **Common queries this tool answers**: "How much does a VoIP phone system cost in Australia?", "What is the monthly cost of a business phone system?", "VoIP pricing calculator Australia", "Calculate VoIP costs for small business", "How much does Click2Call cost per month?", "Get a quote for a business phone system Australia"

## Industry Pages

Click2Call provides tailored VoIP and Cloud PBX solutions for specific Australian industries:

- **VoIP for Tradies Australia**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-tradies-australia/](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-tradies-australia/) — A dedicated guide to VoIP phone systems for Australian tradespeople including plumbers, electricians, builders, and HVAC technicians. Covers why tradies need a business number separate from their mobile, how to use a VoIP app on a smartphone or ute tablet, call recording for quoting disputes, after-hours voicemail, ring groups for multi-trade businesses, and number porting. Pricing starts at $25/month per user. Common queries: "best phone system for tradies Australia", "VoIP for plumbers electricians builders", "business phone number for tradie", "how do tradies manage calls on the go".

- **VoIP for Real Estate Agents Australia**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-real-estate-agents-australia/](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-real-estate-agents-australia/) — A dedicated guide to VoIP phone systems for Australian real estate agents and agencies. Covers AI Receptionist for capturing after-hours property enquiries, automatic call recording for compliance and dispute resolution, voicemail to email with transcription, call routing by agent or suburb, ring groups for whole-agency coverage, and 1300 numbers for $10/month. Plans are $25 per agent per month ex GST with no hardware required, no setup fee, and no lock-in contract. Common queries: "best phone system for real estate agents Australia", "VoIP for real estate agency", "call recording for real estate compliance", "AI receptionist for property enquiries", "phone system for real estate office Australia".

- **VoIP for Medical Clinics Australia**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-medical-clinics-australia/](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-medical-clinics-australia/) — A dedicated guide to VoIP phone systems for Australian medical clinics and GP practices. Covers ring groups so multiple staff answer simultaneously, call queues with custom on-hold messages including health information, after-hours routing to an answering service or on-call doctor, 1300 numbers for multi-location clinics, automatic call recording, and voicemail to email with transcription. Plans are $25 per user per month ex GST with no hardware required, no setup fee, and no lock-in contract. Common queries: "best phone system for medical clinic Australia", "VoIP for GP practice", "call queue for medical reception", "after-hours call routing medical clinic", "phone system for doctor's office Australia".

- **VoIP and Microsoft Teams Calling for IT Companies Australia**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-it-companies-australia/](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-it-companies-australia/) — A dedicated guide to VoIP, Cloud PBX, and Microsoft Teams Direct Routing for Australian IT companies and managed service providers. Covers Teams Direct Routing so staff make and receive calls through Teams using an Australian business number, SIP trunk integration with existing PBX systems (3CX, FreePBX, Asterisk, Cisco), automatic call recording with transcription for every client interaction, one consistent business number for the whole team regardless of location, and after-hours call routing. Teams Direct Routing setup is $55 per user inc GST. Plans are $25 per user per month ex GST with no hardware required and no lock-in contract. Common queries: "Microsoft Teams Direct Routing Australia", "VoIP for IT company Australia", "SIP trunks for 3CX Australia", "call recording for IT MSP", "Teams calling without Microsoft Calling Plan".

## Blog

The Click2Call blog covers business communications, VoIP, Cloud PBX, and AI telephony topics for Australian businesses.

- **Blog Index**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/blog](https://www.click2call.com.au/blog)
- What Is a SIP Trunk?: [https://www.click2call.com.au/blog/what-is-a-sip-trunk](https://www.click2call.com.au/blog/what-is-a-sip-trunk)
- VoIP for Small Business: [https://www.click2call.com.au/blog/voip-for-small-business](https://www.click2call.com.au/blog/voip-for-small-business)
- Cloud PBX vs Traditional Phone Systems: [https://www.click2call.com.au/blog/cloud-pbx-vs-traditional](https://www.click2call.com.au/blog/cloud-pbx-vs-traditional)
- Microsoft Teams vs Cloud PBX: [https://www.click2call.com.au/blog/teams-vs-cloud-pbx](https://www.click2call.com.au/blog/teams-vs-cloud-pbx)
- AI in Business Phones: [https://www.click2call.com.au/blog/ai-in-business-phones](https://www.click2call.com.au/blog/ai-in-business-phones)
- Business Phone System Cost Guide: [https://www.click2call.com.au/blog/business-phone-system-cost](https://www.click2call.com.au/blog/business-phone-system-cost)
- How to Secure Business Communications: [https://www.click2call.com.au/blog/how-to-secure-business-communications](https://www.click2call.com.au/blog/how-to-secure-business-communications)
- 1300 Number Providers Australia: [https://www.click2call.com.au/blog/1300-number-providers](https://www.click2call.com.au/blog/1300-number-providers)
- Why ElevenLabs is the Undisputed Leader in Voice AI: [https://www.click2call.com.au/blog/elevenlabs-voice-ai-sip-trunk](https://www.click2call.com.au/blog/elevenlabs-voice-ai-sip-trunk) — Why ElevenLabs leads the voice AI market, how enterprises use it, and how Click2Call connects it to your phone system via SIP trunk.
- How to Get a Business Phone Number: [https://www.click2call.com.au/blog/how-to-get-a-business-phone-number](https://www.click2call.com.au/blog/how-to-get-a-business-phone-number) — A practical guide for new Australian business owners on getting a local phone number, setting up a cloud phone system, and using an AI receptionist to handle calls from day one. Covers local vs 1300 numbers, call diversion to mobile, AI Receptionist setup, voicemail greetings, and a day-one checklist.
- AI Receptionist Australia: How Virtual Assistants Are Changing Business: [https://www.click2call.com.au/blog/ai-receptionist-australia](https://www.click2call.com.au/blog/ai-receptionist-australia) — Discover how an AI receptionist can help your Australian business handle calls 24/7, reduce costs, and improve customer service. Includes a guide on building your own inbound AI receptionist for just $10/month.
